positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a friendly, playful cosmic forest landscape. Features stylized bioluminescent mushrooms, floating constellations, gentle nebula clouds, and abstract geometric rock formations bathed in soft, ethereal starlight. The composition is perfectly centered, creating a harmonious, symmetrical pattern suitable for all-over print on apparel. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by deep indigo blues, glowing cyan, warm lavender, and accents of neon lime green. The style should be clean, vector-graphic quality digital painting with crisp lines and defined silhouettes, reminiscent of modern Nordic folk art meets cosmic fantasy. High contrast is key for printability.
negative: blurry, messy, amateur, low resolution, grainy, signature, watermark, text, logos, people, cars, anatomy issues, extra limbs, deformed, artifacts
